repository_truth: No repository-backed orchestration layer invokes SurfacePackagePlanner.
No certified Builder entrypoint for PIC generation exists.
No repository-backed PIC ZIP materialization pipeline exists.

recommended_next_authority.title: PIC Materialization Orchestrator
recommended_next_authority.objective: Introduce the canonical Builder orchestration layer that consumes the Certified Builder Input Set, resolves declared constitutional authorities, generates PACKAGE-MANIFEST.md and IMPLEMENT.md, and materializes a Claude PIC ZIP.
